mapper.insert:
INSERT into check_work (id, check_date, create_id, state, clock_in_state, clock_out_state, work_hours, time_id, tenant_id) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.checkDate}, #{item.createId}, #{item.state}, #{item.clockInState}, #{item.clockOutState}, #{item.workHours}, #{item.timeId}, #{tenantId})
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id FROM check_work a INNER JOIN sys_eve_user b ON b.id = a.create_id INNER JOIN sys_eve_user_staff c ON b.id = c.user_id INNER JOIN sys_eve_user_staff_time d ON c.id = d.staff_id AND d.check_work_time_id = #{timeId} AND a.time_id = d.check_work_time_id
INNER JOIN tenant_user e ON e.staff_id = c.id AND e.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
WHERE a.check_date = #{yesterdayTime} AND b.user_lock = 0 AND (a.clock_out IS NULL OR LENGTH(a.clock_out) = 0)
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND d.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND (e.state != 2 OR e.quit_time IS NULL OR LENGTH(e.quit_time) = 0 OR e.quit_time >= #{yesterdayTime})

SELECT b.start_time clockIn, b.end_time clockOut FROM sys_eve_user_staff_time a, check_work_time b WHERE a.staff_id = #{staffId} AND a.check_work_time_id = #{timeId} AND a.check_work_time_id = b.id
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND b.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

choose.when: (c.state != 2 OR c.quit_time IS NULL OR LENGTH(c.quit_time) = 0 OR c.quit_time >= #{startTime})
choose.otherwise: (a.state != 2 OR a.quit_time IS NULL OR LENGTH(a.quit_time) = 0 OR a.quit_time >= #{startTime})

mapper.select:
SELECT a.id staffId, IFNULL(a.user_id, '') userId,
c.job_number jobNumber, c.company_id companyId, c.department_id departmentId, c.job_id jobId,
a.job_number jobNumber, a.company_id companyId, a.department_id departmentId, a.job_id jobId,
a.user_name userName,
MAX(c.state) state, MAX(IFNULL(c.quit_time, '')) quitTime,
a.state state, IFNULL(a.quit_time, '') quitTime,
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT b.check_work_time_id SEPARATOR ',') timsIds, (SELECT count(1) from check_work where create_id = a.user_id and state = 1 and check_date >= #{startTime} and #{endTime} >= check_date ) fullTime, (SELECT count(1) from check_work where create_id = a.user_id and state = 2 and check_date >= #{startTime} and #{endTime} >= check_date ) absenteeism, (SELECT count(1) from check_work where create_id = a.user_id and state = 3 and check_date >= #{startTime} and #{endTime} >= check_date ) lackTime, (SELECT count(1) from check_work where create_id = a.user_id and clock_in_state = 2 and check_date >= #{startTime} and #{endTime} >= check_date ) late, (SELECT count(1) from check_work where create_id = a.user_id and clock_out_state = 2 and check_date >= #{startTime} and #{endTime} >= check_date ) leaveEarly, (SELECT count(1) from check_work where create_id = a.user_id and ((clock_out is not null and clock_in is null) or (clock_out is null and clock_in is not null)) and check_date >= #{startTime} and #{endTime} >= check_date ) missing FROM sys_eve_user_staff a
INNER JOIN tenant_user c ON c.staff_id = a.id AND c.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
INNER JOIN sys_eve_user_staff_time b ON b.staff_id = a.id AND b.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND b.check_work_time_id = #{timeId}
LEFT JOIN sys_eve_user_staff_time b ON b.staff_id = a.id AND b.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
INNER JOIN sys_eve_user_staff_time b ON b.staff_id = a.id AND b.check_work_time_id = #{timeId}
LEFT JOIN sys_eve_user_staff_time b ON b.staff_id = a.id
AND a.user_name LIKE '%${userName}%'
GROUP BY a.id
ORDER BY c.entry_time DESC, a.user_name
ORDER BY a.entry_time DESC, a.user_name
mapper.sql:
INNER JOIN sys_eve_user_staff b ON cw.create_id = b.user_id
INNER JOIN tenant_user c ON c.staff_id = b.id AND c.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

choose.when: AND (c.state != 2 OR c.quit_time IS NULL OR LENGTH(c.quit_time) = 0 OR c.quit_time >= #{day})
choose.otherwise: AND (b.state != 2 OR b.quit_time IS NULL OR LENGTH(b.quit_time) = 0 OR b.quit_time >= #{day})
SELECT NULL checkDay, 0 fullTime, 0 absenteeism, 0 lackTime, 0 late, 0 leaveEarly, 0 missing WHERE 1 = 0

sql.if: AND ((a.clock_out IS NOT NULL AND a.clock_in IS NULL) OR (a.clock_out IS NULL AND a.clock_in IS NOT NULL))

mapper.sql:
INNER JOIN sys_eve_user_staff b ON a.create_id = b.user_id
INNER JOIN tenant_user c ON c.staff_id = b.id AND c.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.`name`, a.start_time `start`, a.end_time `end`, CASE a.all_day WHEN '0' THEN false WHEN '1' THEN true ELSE true END allDay, CASE a.type WHEN '1' THEN '#63B8FF' WHEN '2' THEN '#CD69C9' WHEN '3' THEN '#54FF9F' WHEN '4' THEN '#FF0000' WHEN '5' THEN '#ADADAD' ELSE '' END backgroundColor, '2' showBg, false editable, #是否可编辑 a.type, 'xiu' className FROM schedule_day a WHERE a.type = '3' AND (
DATE_FORMAT(a.start_time, '%Y-%m') = #{item} OR DATE_FORMAT(a.end_time, '%Y-%m') = #{item} OR
1 = 0)
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}

SELECT a.staff_id staffId, a.check_work_time_id timeId FROM sys_eve_user_staff_time a WHERE a.staff_id = #{staffId}
AND a.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
